nasb.text: My beloved is like a gazelle or a young stag. Behold, he is standing behind our wall, He is looking through the windows, He is peering through the lattice.

esv.text: My beloved is like a gazelle or a young stag. Behold, there he stands behind our wall, gazing through the windows, looking through the lattice.

cnv.text: 我的良人像羚羊，像小鹿。 看哪！他站在我們的牆後； 從窗口觀看， 從窗格往裡面探視。

ccb.text: 我的良人好像羚羊和幼鹿。 看啊，他就在墙外， 正从窗户往里观看， 从窗棂间往里窥视。
